pages.raw_text:
The franchise application of the
Oregon Railroad & Navigation Co.
for a single track crossing North
Monroe st. will be read next Tues
day night In the council, according
to an agreement reached in Mayor
Moore's Office yesterday between
railroad officials and councilmen.
The franchise as originally asked
for will be materially changed, l
track being provided for instead
Of 2. II is proposed that the COM
pany move cars only l hour at
night and hour in the morning.


No conclusion was reached re-
garding the proposition of expense
Of building viaducts on Division
and Washington SITS, to be borne
by the o. r. & N. ]. p. O'Brien,
general manager, was allowed to
take plans of these viaducts with
him to Portland, where his engl-
neers will give them close consid.
Grafton.
